narrative:
Precinct Lewisburg Village South (precinct in Preble County) has 453 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
